lectures.t: Status of farm mechanization in India; power availability on farms and trends in mechanization

section: M.Tech / ICAR-NET — Agricultural Structures & Process Engineering

lectures.t: Basic laws of thermodynamics; thermodynamic properties and processes

Mass transfer and mass-heat-momentum transfer analogies

Finite difference and finite element analysis
